result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  check      Checks the environment for required dependencies.
  install    Installs the specified component from GitHub.
  list       Lists all available components from GitHub repository.
  update     Updates all installed components in the specified Godot project path.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  check      Checks the environment for required dependencies.
  install    Installs the specified component from GitHub.
  list       Lists all available components from GitHub repository.
  update     Updates all installed components in the specified Godot project path.

result.stdout:
Usage: check [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Checks the environment for required dependencies.

Options:
  --path <string>     (Default: @"")

commands.payload:
Usage: check [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Checks the environment for required dependencies.

Options:
  --path <string>     (Default: @"")

result.stdout:
Usage: install [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Installs the specified component from GitHub.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The name of the component to install.
  [1] <string>    The path to the Godot project.

Options:
  --force                Whether to force overwrite if the component already exists. (Optional)
  --skip-dependencies    Whether to skip installing dependencies. (Optional)
  --from-release         Whether to download from the latest release instead of cloning the repo. (Optional)
  --example              Whether to install example files (if any). (Optional)

commands.payload:
Usage: install [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Installs the specified component from GitHub.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    The name of the component to install.
  [1] <string>    The path to the Godot project.

Options:
  --force                Whether to force overwrite if the component already exists. (Optional)
  --skip-dependencies    Whether to skip installing dependencies. (Optional)
  --from-release         Whether to download from the latest release instead of cloning the repo. (Optional)
  --example              Whether to install example files (if any). (Optional)

result.stdout:
Usage: list [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Lists all available components from GitHub repository.

Options:
  --repo <string>     (Default: @"")

result.stdout:
Usage: update [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Updates all installed components in the specified Godot project path.

Options:
  --path <string>    The path to the Godot project (default: current directory). (Default: @".")

Options:
